name: Sausage in Cream Sauce (Pstt79c)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a very large skillet. Melt butter and olive oil together.
2. Add the onion and garlic, sautéing until translucent.
3. Add the sausage meat and spices to the onion mixture.
4. Cook on moderate heat for 10 to 15 minutes, or until the sausage is completely cooked.
5. Stir in the heavy cream and reduce by one-third. This should take about 5 minutes on moderate heat.
6. Stir frequently to ensure it doesn't stick or burn. Taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
7. Pour over hot pasta of your choice. Enjoy!
